title: Bright Ideas Coloured Tissue 48 Sheets, Gift Wrapping Paper for Christmas, Birthday Party and Arts & Crafts, Light Blue, 50cm x 76cm
features: Bright Ideas 48 Tissue paper sheets are rolled onto a cardboard core and then supplied in a clear cellophane wrap for extra protection from dust and moisture – we have 19 bright and colourful colours available in the range
Each bright and colourful tissue paper sheet measures 50cm by 76cm wide and are a solid colour on both sides. Please note that product colour may slightly vary due to photographic lighting sourcing

This single-coloured tissue paper is Light Blue in colour on both sides, lightweight and breathable and is made from 17gsm paper, our tissue paper is Colour-Fast and acid free - this means that they are safe to use with food and the colours will not run when they get wet

These tissues paper sheets are made from soft tissue paper, easy to bend, fold, shape, glue and turn into whatever you’d like, they can be cut into the proper size at will, single sheet or multiple sheets can be stacked for your needs

Perfect for classroom crafting and most arts and crafts, colourful tissue paper sheets will be a great addition to your arts & crafts supplies. Ideal for all DIY projects like flower making, scrapbooking, greeting cards, papier Mache, bouquet packaging and can also be used as package filling
description: Product Description Big value tissue paper roll in light blue, each containing 48 sheets. Each sheet measures 50cm x 76cm. Colour-fast and acid-free. Safety Warning Acid Free & Non-Bleed
